title: Work with multi-disciplinary delivery and engineering teams to facilitate the production and review of plans, bid docume…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Work with multi-disciplinary delivery and engineering teams to facilitate the production and review of plans, bid documents, construction documents and procurement materials for various utility systems including but not limited to pumping/lift stations, water/wastewater pipelines, and treatment plants

Performs medium-complex engineering and assurance tasks and particularly important engineering work efficiently and accurately related to the mechanical and process engineering needs of the program.

Reviews supplier drawing submittals, shop drawings and other engineering documents and exercises engineering judgement to address project technical needs.

Provides technical support to Delivery Project Teams.

Supports the review and checks of designs including scope and BOQ checks and reviews and/or prepares responses to tender queries and RFIs related to assigned projects.

Write, review, and provide clear, concise input to investigation, regulatory, permitting or design reports

Supports the Engineering Manager and other sector leads in performing other tasks as deemed necessary as related to assigned projects.

Support the Engineering and Project managers with coordinating and tracking stakeholder engineering requirements across projects

Ensures adherence to all corporate, program, contractual, ethics and safety standards, policies, and procedures.

Display strong communication and interpersonal skills and work in a fast-paced delivery program.

Performs other responsibilities associated with this position as may be appropriate.  Extract major key words and prepare a statement to add it in my resume
